degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial no-network API review requested order-independent WithNoNetwork redaction and public Dirty state after accepted exports.
Initial redaction/snapshot review requested Dirty state transitions and nested event name/error preservation in snapshots.
Updated WithNoNetwork to defer exporter construction until after all options and validation, using final RedactionOptions.
Updated NoNetworkExporter to mark dirty on accepted non-empty exports and preserve nested event name, error, attributes, and redaction.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
